# Electrical Engineering

**Summary**: The study of electricity, electronics, and electromagnetism.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] focused on the design of analog signal processing circuits using current conveyors.

## Key Subtopics

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] multiphase sinusoidal oscillators, universal filter design, translinear loops.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] circuit modeling, simulation, sensitivity analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The thesis demonstrates that CCII-based designs offer independent control over critical parameters while maintaining low sensitivity. ([[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997, p. 22]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[1997-al-gahtani|Al-Gahtani, 1997]] Overcoming limitations in bandwidth and dynamic range of traditional op-amp designs.
